description: Style NoteFor morning jogs or training out on the field, your comfort will be enhanced with this track top. A lightweight jacket that looks great while keeping you warm will help you beat the monsoon chill in style. This reversible jacket from adidas is simply a must have for those who like to look fashionable always. Product DetailsReversible jacket - grey on one side and dark blue on the other side, has a zipped placket, mock collar, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, and ribbed hemlineGrey side has Adidas branding and embroidered and printed floral detail and patch pockets in frontDark blue side has a blue and grey panel on the chest, branding embroidered under the collar at the back and zippered insert pockets in front above the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
